data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates Distributed Denial-of-Service attacks to maintain service availability.
data.technical_spec: Integration of Cloud Armor for defense against large-scale attacks.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures secure data transfer between client and server.
data.technical_spec: Use of HTTPS and TLS for secure communications.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Employs AI and machine learning to detect security threats.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of Chronicle for threat analysis and response.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Requires multiple forms of verification for account access.
data.technical_spec: Supports 2FA and security keys for enhanced user login security.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent security audits to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Periodic penetration testing and code reviews.
